text:
Jaredfromsubway impersonator is about to launch the first rug.

Please stay away.

And if you think a guy with 20M+ is gonna launch a pumpfun token to make you rich I suggest to stay away from crypto as well. https://t.co/aqf9bHGd5S

I just got banned from @trylimitless prediction market platform and accused of "wash trading."

The reality is that I simply had a profitable bot that made 1800$ after a lot of fine tuning.

Those were the accusations:

> "Wash trading": To do wash trading, you need to constantly buy and sell the same asset.
The bot NEVER SOLD A SINGLE POSITION and always held until expiry.

>"Point farming": I was not that high (290) in the leaderboard. I literally discovered today that there was an airdrop and claimed ~$670.
At least this was the good part.

I am happy to show all the proof of what I am saying since they didn't show any proof of their claims.

Every day, a new impersonator.

This time we have an account that is riding the news of jaredfromsubway.eth got drained and impersonate him.

The account changed the username multiple times and he is promising a 1M bounty which is clearly fake but got a 170k impressions.

In max 24h you will see this account shilling a rug.

Another small larp alert.

This account (@BwamDev) is impersonating "Bwam".

If you don't know bwam, is the most profitable memecoin deployer (first 4 char of the address).

The account already changed the name multiple times. https://t.co/qnMX8tDnwu
We live in a simulation

Only in crypto you should feel sad for someone that "lost everything" while:

> Holding ~230k in his cluster of wallets
> Deposited +600k on CEXes during last years https://t.co/UwLeiiSHdz

The Riviera "game" I mentioned yesterday already rugged.

> ~$60k dollars profit for them just considering creation fees and main wallet

> MC down from 1M to 39k in 24h
> All tweets from the Larp Cabal deleted

Even "small rugs" are more profitable than everything else. https://t.co/oB0HRaYMOL

Scam Alert: if you buy the token $RIV (connected to this "game" prepare to lose everything.

This is a token shilled by the "Larp Gang" with this pattern:
> Larp as famous HL Trader
> Buy engagement
> Block me
> Promoting scams

Updated list here 👇 https://t.co/kNqkeGDx5I

Here you have the list of top wallet for the Megaeth USDM airdrop

> Only 4 people above 4 figures
> ~2900 wallet received the airdrop
> Average size 169$ 

(I got 5 dollars) https://t.co/LRLmotFsGB
Across the multiverse, there’s at least one reality where Lamine Yamal came home after the 0-0 draw bet and he's currently bridging his 9M bet profit to Ethereum https://t.co/B6p4uJ6S0G

My mission here has always been to help people fight scams.

Unfortunately, I've realized that scammers are much better at attracting people who have just joined crypto with clickbait content like this.

The solution I found is to create clickbait content too (sometimes).

But instead of shilling shitcoins, rugs, or presales with shady teams, I'll try to help you avoid losing money.

If you already know me, I'm sorry you had to read a post like this today.

If you don't, I wanna give the most likely explanation for this "insider of the Spanish team"

Did we just have the first World Cup game completely rigged for money on Polymarket?

"Fishalive" made ~$9 million by betting on Spain not winning against Cape Verde.

> First trade: Bet $4.5M against Spain 8 minutes before the game began

> Everything came from a network of freshly funded Coinbase wallets with no previous activity

This is just a conspiracy theory, but it's really odd.

Some explain me this.

> Fresh wallet with zero history
> The only bet: Spain not winning against Cabo Verde

8.5 Million profit.

Was the game rigged? https://t.co/agvZKWc0GA

Insane.

After grinding with +1k predictions on Polymarket this wallet was up 34k.

Today he lost 1.6M on a single trade because Spain wasn't able to win against Cabo Verde https://t.co/hURJczBRnc

Interesting coincidence here:

> The only affected Humanity token is the BSC Deployment
> The BSC version of the token is used in Binance Alpha
> Binance Alpha is used as a price source for Binance Perp
> Binance perp is the biggest market (where you can make more money) https://t.co/jjf6clqq8s

I just discovered that Humanity ($H) was an investment by Mario Nawfal's company.

It was heavily promoted, of course.

After Intodotspace, another one on his record.

The red flag of red flags. https://t.co/rOB4lvPkXJ

All the comment below this post are:

"Bro are you stupid, he made money"

For average crypto person nothing is bad as long as you're making money

I am really far from this mentality and that's the reason why I have close to zero friends in this space

A poor Indian guy ruined his life by getting a tattoo on his head.

If exploiting people for entertainment wasn't enough, there's more:

• The token is already dead (it peaked at an $800K market cap)
• Almost no one made money from it
• Pumpfun has a new viral story to extract money 

A quick look at the top traders of $boutywork and who they are

While everyone is losing money on the NYC token, the NYC token wallet, promoted by former mayor Eric Adams, cashed out another $175K.

> The token went from $180M to $20M in 20 minutes, > Team removed 2M in liquidity
> They promised a buyback.
> The buyback never happened.
> After ~6 months, they cashed out ~$2M.

Another amazing service to the community, heavily rewarded by this space.

I am monitoring ~36k market right now.

Let's see which one will change the rules first
